notes.issuing_agency: Substring / regexp body; matched against payload issuing_agency
notes.issue_date: Exact dd/mm/yyyy as stored in payload
notes.domains: Array of strings; e.g. ["law"] — uses MatchAny on payload list
notes.chapter_number: Roman or arabic (1–399) normalized to Roman for metadata.hierarchy.chapter_number
notes.article_number: After vector search: post-filter on chunk_id (__dieu_{n}__) — needed because qdrant-client has no MatchRegexp
